name: DepChecker
description: Trinity-built dependency scanner and auto-fixer. Scans APT and PIP packages for vulnerabilities, outdated versions, and broken dependencies. Auto-fix ON with V approval.
author: Victory + Trinity

tools.name: depchecker_scan
tools.description: Scan system APT and PIP packages for vulnerabilities and deprecated packages. Returns a full report.

tools.name: depchecker_fix
tools.description: Auto-fix detected dependency issues. Reinstalls broken APT packages, upgrades deprecated PIP packages.
